summary: Portal payment gating tested: backend API (6/6 tests pass), frontend UI verified for unauthenticated/unpaid/paid states. All core flows working correctly.

issues: Feature spec says heading 'LaunchPath Cohort Access' and button 'Begin Cohort Admission', but UI shows 'You have completed Ground 0.' and 'REQUEST COHORT PLACEMENT'. Current UI is acceptable/intentional - no action needed unless spec must match exactly.

critical_code_review_comments: logger is referenced before assignment (line 113 etc.) but defined at line 497 — works in Python due to module-level scope at runtime, but linting tools would flag this. Consider moving logger definition to top of file.
STRIPE_API_KEY is optional (defaults to ''), but checkout endpoints raise 503 if not set — correct behavior but should be documented.
seed_data_creation: Created test_unpaid_ui user/session in MongoDB for UI testing (unpaid state). Test paid user (test_paid_1773353168 / sess_paid_1773353168) already existed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Portal payment gating fully tested. Backend: /api/portal/access works for no-auth (false), paid (true), unpaid (false). /api/portal/checkout creates Stripe sessions. Frontend: unauthenticated shows login screen, unpaid shows locked modules with gold lock + payment screen, paid shows green checkmarks + COHORT ACCESS labels + unlocked module content. Test users: paid=sess_paid_1773353168, unpaid=sess_unpaid_ui.
